title: Versioning, Delete Markers, Object Lock, and Recovery · Systems Transfer
summary: An independent team receives different tenants, file sizes, media types, regions, compliance duties, traffic, failures, and cost limits and transfers versioning, delete markers, object lock, and recovery into a new version and immutable-retention recovery runbook. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of version and immutable-retention recovery runbook with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, c…
objectives: Distinguish unversioned, enabled, and suspended versioning and test null versions, overwrite behavior, and lifecycle impact.
List versions and delete markers, resolve current reads, restore by removing a marker or copying a version, and preserve audit identity.
Apply governance, compliance, legal hold, retention date, and authorized bypass by version with irreversible-risk review.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Versioning State Transition
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go file-delivery team handles case 9003 during an SDK and infrastructure canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate version identity, immutable retention meaning, and executed restore evidence; keep browser execution deterministic and move AWS claims to an authorized transfer gate; then change the object version and prove stale authority is rejected. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: S3, CloudFront, and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Versioning State Transition.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish unversioned, enabled, and suspended versioning and test null versions, overwrite behavior, and lifecycle impact. For S3, CloudFront, and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Versioning State Transition, keep Versioning State Transition connected to executable Go storage and delivery decision evidence.
